threats.title: New Russian-Linked GREYVIBE Targets Ukraine with AI-Powered Cyberattacks
threats.summary: A previously undocumented threat actor dubbed GREYVIBE has been attributed to ongoing and persistent attacks targeting Ukraine and Ukraine-related entities since at least August 2025. threats.title: What 2,000 Exposed Vibe-Coded Apps Reveal About the Limits of Most Security Stacks
threats.summary: Shadow AI used to mean employees pasting things they shouldn't into ChatGPT. It now means something bigger: employees building full applications with AI, wiring them into production systems, and publishing them on the open internet. Without Security or IT in the loop. threats.title: Malicious Sicoob NuGet Steals Banking Credentials as npm Packages Target Cloud Secrets
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a malicious NuGet package that masquerades as a C# software development kit for Sicoob, one of Brazil's largest cooperative financial systems, to siphon client IDs and PFX certificates.
